evals.prompt: I exported my SEMrush Site Audit results as a CSV. Route the issues and produce a prioritized remediation queue with unknown issue handling.
evals.expected_output: JSON and markdown outputs with prioritized_queue sorted by P0-P3, unknown_issue_ids listed, and manual_handoffs documented.

evals.prompt: Run strict mode routing on this CSV and fail if there are any unknown issue IDs.
evals.expected_output: Non-zero exit code when unknown issues are present; zero exit code when all IDs are in the registry.

evals.prompt: Validate the issue registry to make sure all issue-to-domain mappings are structurally valid.
evals.expected_output: validate_registry.py exits 0 and reports no schema integrity errors.
